case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROBERTY SUJECT TO DISPOSITION $613.00

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT FILED BY PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT PROBERTY SUJECT TO DISPOSITION $613.00 JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

POS OF ORDER COMPELLING ANSWERS TO DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION AND INSPECTION OF DOCS; TO FORM INTERROGATORIES; TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO CLAIMANT BROOKS, JAPAUL

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $120.00 BE RELEASED TO CLAIMANT JAPAUL BROOKS. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $493.00 PLUS INTEREST SINCE DATE OF DEPOSIT IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO H&S 11470 ET SEQ AND DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY H&S 11489. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. CLAIMANT WAIVES HIS/HER RIGHT TO HAVE SAME JUDGE OR JURY DECIDE BOTH THE CRIMINAL AND FORFEITURE CASE. CLAIMANT WAIVES CONDITION PRECEDENT TO THIS FORFEITURE. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.
NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA HEARING SET FOR JUN-08-2006 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT 612
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUN-08-2006 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 612

DISCOVERY 612, NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. PETITIONER'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO PETITIONER'S FIRST SET OF DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION AND INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS, FIRST SET OF SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, AND JUDICIAL COUNCIL FORM INTERROGATORIES IS GRANTED. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT (SEE MINI MINUTES FOR DETAILS.)
ORDER COMPELLING ANSWERS TO DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION AND INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS; TO FORM INTERROGATORIES; TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers
Off Calendar Jun-08-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Petitioner's Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioner's First Set Of Demand For Production and Inspection Of Documents, First Set Of Special Interrogatories, and Judicial Council Form Interrogatories is granted. No opposition has been filed. Claimant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
